faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about earning rewards and advertising with us.
faq.q1: How do I earn rewards from ads?
faq.a1: Simply browse ads that interest you, view the content, and claim the reward shown. Rewards are credited to your account and can be cashed out once you reach the minimum balance.
faq.q2: Is it free for advertisers to join?
faq.a2: Yes. Creating an advertiser account is free. You only pay for the ad budget you allocate to campaigns, plus a small platform fee based on performance.
faq.q3: What makes SmartAdDeals different from other ad networks?
faq.a3: We combine AI-powered optimization, privacy-first targeting, geographic heatmaps, and a reward-based engagement model that values user attention.
faq.q4: How does the AI optimization work?
faq.a4: Our machine learning engine analyzes campaign performance in real time and recommends adjustments to bids, budgets, audiences, and creatives to improve ROAS.
faq.q5: Can I integrate SmartAdDeals with my existing ad accounts?
faq.a5: Yes. We offer integrations with major programmatic platforms and ad exchanges. Visit our developer docs to learn more about API and OAuth connections.

testimonials.t3text: Our team loves the Ad Journey Storyteller. It turns dry campaign data into compelling narratives we actually want to share with stakeholders.

about.title: About SmartAdDeals
about.subtitle: We're building the future of intelligent advertising — where brands connect with engaged audiences and users earn real value for their attention.
about.missionP1: SmartAdDeals was born from a simple idea: advertising doesn't have to be intrusive, and attention has real value. We created a two-sided platform that empowers advertisers with AI-driven campaign management while rewarding users who choose to engage with content that interests them.
about.missionP2: Our platform combines advanced analytics — geographic heatmaps, cross-device attribution, anomaly detection, and competitive benchmarking — with a unique Ad Journey Storyteller that transforms raw data into compelling campaign narratives.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we build.

precision.title: Precision
precision.desc: Every ad reaches the right audience through intelligent targeting and AI-driven optimization.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Full audit trails, honest analytics, and no hidden fees. What you see is what you get.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: From the Ad Journey Storyteller to real-time anomaly detection, we push the boundaries of AdTech.

community.title: Community
community.desc: We believe users deserve value for their attention. Our reward system makes advertising a two-way street.

trust.title: Trust
trust.desc: We protect advertiser data and user privacy with enterprise-grade security and compliance.

creativity.title: Creativity
creativity.desc: Our AI Creative Generator helps brands produce compelling ad variations at scale.

about.journeySubtitle: From an idea to a global platform.

faq.q1: How quickly do you respond to inquiries?
faq.a1: We aim to reply to all messages within one business day. Enterprise customers receive priority support.
faq.q2: Can I schedule a demo for my team?
faq.a2: Absolutely. Fill out the form with your company details and select "Sales demo" as the topic. Our team will reach out to schedule a time.
faq.q3: Do you offer custom enterprise plans?
faq.a3: Yes. We offer tailored plans for agencies and large advertisers. Contact our sales team for pricing and onboarding options.
faq.q4: Where can I find technical documentation?
faq.a4: Registered users can access our docs from the dashboard. You can also request API documentation through this form.

campaignCreate.title: Create Campaign

campaignCreate.name: Campaign Name
campaignCreate.discountSharedHint: Percent of a customer's purchase shared back as their discount at redemption.
campaignCreate.rewardEconomicsHint: How much of your discount is shared with consumers as tokens, and how many tokens each interaction earns. The campaign pauses automatically once the token pool is spent.
campaignCreate.consumerShareHint: Portion of the discount handed back as reward tokens.
campaignCreate.maxTokensHint: Total reward tokens this campaign may issue.
campaignCreate.businessHint: Shown on this campaign's adverts so customers can find and reach you.
campaignCreate.logoHint: Shown on your adverts; defaults to your profile avatar.
campaignCreate.localizedTargetingHint: Target users based on precise location data
campaignCreate.dropFiles: Drop files here or click to upload
campaignCreate.dropFilesHint: Support images (PNG, JPG) and videos (MP4, MOV)
campaignCreate.ageRestrictedHint: Viewers will need to verify their age before viewing
campaignCreate.enableAiHint: Let our AI automatically optimize your campaign for better performance. Available after 48 hours of runtime.
